title: Gemini Canvas Tutorial: How to Use Google's Most Underrated AI Tool
summary: Gemini Canvas is a Google AI tool that builds websites, no-code apps, dashboards, and audio podcasts from prompts within Gemini. The tutorial demonstrates six levels of functionality from document editing to advanced combinations.
writeup: This tutorial covers Gemini Canvas, a Google AI tool inside Gemini that generates websites, no-code apps, dashboards, and audio podcasts from prompts. It walks through six levels of functionality, ranging from document editing to advanced combinations of features. The demonstration shows how a single interface handles tasks spanning code generation and content creation, illustrating where the tool fits for users building outputs directly from prompts.
